person_name: Lucius Quinctius Cincinnatus, Roman consul and dictator (fl. 5th century BCE)
person_name_full: Lucius Quinctius Cincinnatus, Roman consul and dictator (fl. 5th century BCE)
notes: Roman consul and dictator famed for his modesty and devotion to the Republic, known for returning to his farm after service.

docs.title: Roman History, Book Book 5
docs.author: Cassius Dio
docs.excerpt: … Quinctius, who was a poor man and had devoted his life to farming, but was distinguished for his excellence and moderation; though he did let his hair grow in curls, whence he was named Cincinnatus.
